Player UI clean after scrim/immersive fixes

blockers.description: GitHub Actions CI was billing-blocked (private-repo free minutes exhausted)
blockers.workaround: RESOLVED — made repo public; public repos get unlimited free Actions. CI now green on clean runner.

blockers.description: Phase 10 EdEC/BouncyCastle: :app:validateSigningDebug fails on CI runners (NoClassDefFoundError); assembleDebug works LOCALLY
blockers.workaround: CI stays compile-only; Phase 10 is the isolated non-gating probe to re-evaluate under AGP-9 (capture full stack trace on an AGP-9 runner first)

human_actions_pending.action: Secret scanning 'non-provider patterns' + 'validity checks' — user confirmed enabled in UI; REST API under-reports them as disabled (cosmetic)
Optionally delete or .gitignore the untracked sl.zip (icon handoff artifact) in repo root

decisions.decision: D-04b LIFTED — adopt Kotlin 2.3.20 + KSP 2.3.9 (KSP2) + AGP-9 built-in Kotlin
decisions.rationale: Kotlin 2.2.x is empirically incompatible with AGP 9 (both paths crash); 2.3.x is the only path that compiles. Research-verified coherent set.
stable 1.4.1 hard-rejects AGP 9; alpha never ships in APK
stable detekt 1.23.8 breaks on Kotlin 2.3.x metadata; only alpha supports 2.3.x

decisions.decision: Scorecard SARIF NOT uploaded to code scanning (publish_results badge kept)
decisions.rationale: Scorecard governance flags are not code bugs; were cluttering the Security tab

next_action: Either (A) device-smoke the remaining core flows on the S23 (connect -> library -> scene detail -> markers/PiP/queue), or (B) /gsd-plan-phase 10 for CI-SIGNING (capture the AGP-9-runner EdEC/bcprov stack trace as the first step). Nothing is blocked or mid-edit.
context_notes: Everything is committed, pushed to both remotes (HEAD 273a8d3), and CI-green. The AGP-9 toolchain milestone (Phases 7-9) is fully landed AND validated on real hardware. Phase 10 (CI signing) is the only remaining roadmap item and is intentionally isolated/non-gating. Full blocker chain (B-08-01..04) + accepted risks live in .planning/STATE.md.
